name: cpwork
description: CPWork - Magento development orchestration platform (Jira -> AI Agent -> Review -> Test -> Staging PR)

scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @cpwork/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @cpwork/web
scripts.dev:api:ts: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @cpwork/api
